_meta.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, etc. (README claims '23 specialists + 8 power tools')
_meta.structure_note: Each skill is a top-level directory at the repo root (NOT nested under skills/). Repo also includes browse, design, make-pdf as compiled binaries plus extension/ for Chrome integration.

new_skills_needing_disposition_assessmen.name: /connect-chrome
